case_title: EDEN RUSSOM VS. REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUSSOM, EDEN AS TO DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUSSOM, EDEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $6,092.24 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,292.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
